name: Hot Sauce B1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Bean sauce (found in Chinese groceries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. To make hot oil, place a handful of dried red peppers in a bowl. Pour hot oil over and let sit. This will keep for several weeks. When needed, use the oil and not the peppers.
3. Garlic, ginger, and dry sherry are essential to Chinese cooking, similar to salt and pepper for Americans. Add them whenever desired.
Temperature (s): HOT
Effort: EASY
Time: 00:05
Source:
MING'S
Comments: YORK ROAD; BALTIMORE
To be used in MING SHRIMP
